title: Constitution of a Tribunal for settlement of disputes under section,10A of the Cost and Works Accountants Act, in the matter of election to the Council of the Institute of cost and works Accountants of india held in june2007

TJcf 4959, ctt^-q 3TI^4tg^^Jt(3Tl^, *-d l<i 4. 3, 4995 22,T[59i9-122017 3. Sit ’’J. Tit. 91691, —51979 (iJ4f eh) ebKMftd 594 49T49, «+>) d <=b I a I I 2. 45 3Tp95f99T 4599 4 H<hRH 5/1 5Rp0 3 9944 hnt I [94. 4. 5/2/2007-4t44-5] 53?44T, Wtf ttfpq 4911 G1/2007 MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 5th December, 2007 S.O. 2104(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (I) of Section 10B of the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959 (23 of 1959) and in pursuance of rule 3 of the Cost and Works Accountants (Election Tribunal) Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby establishes a Tribunal consisting of the following persons to decide the dispute under Section 10A ofthe Act in the matter of election to the Council of the Institute of Cost and Works Accountants of India held in June, 2007, namely:— (1) Shri P. K. Malhotra, —Presiding Officer Joint Secretary and Government Counsel, Department of Legal Affairs, New Delhi. (2) Shri Jugal Kishore Puri, —Member Former Central Council Member, ICWAI, Plot No. 3, Sector 22, Gurgaon-122017. (3) Shri U. C. Nahata, —Member Regional Director, (Eastern Region), Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Kolkata. 2. This notification shall take effect from the date of publication in the Official Gazette. [F.No.5/2/2007-CL-V] JITESH KHOSLA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New-Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
